meta.title: Mocana Sponsor Session: Automated Security Lifecycle Management
meta.description: Dean Weber of Mocana goes into detail on the challenges and crypto and process solutions to the supply chain problem. He covers the development, onboarding, enrollment and update phases, and he stresses how this can be automated to lessen the burden while still providing strong security.
